layers.label: 2MRS Table 3
layers.notes: First local-Universe layer; catalogue rows are browser-rendered after the documented build step.

layers.label: 2MPZ
layers.notes: Photometric-redshift uncertainty is mandatory and must be rendered as a radial uncertainty, never as exact distance.

layers.label: DESI DR1
layers.notes: External tile hosting is required. Data are not committed to Git history; selection, footprint, and release metadata must remain visible.
